calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Emily Lloyd, Tel. 415.939.3552, plaintiff and opposing party, appearing on her own behalf;
Sally Keane, Esq. of MacMorris & Carbone, Tel. 510.267.7255, for defendant and moving party.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT LAURA SANDERSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant met her burden of production on summary judgment, showing that the Complaint was filed one day after the statute of limitations expired. Plaintiff's opposition is procedurally defective for failing to include a separate statement of material facts. Cal.Rule of Court 3.1350(f). However, even disregarding this procedural defect, Plaintiff has not met her burden of production. Plaintiff's declaration states that she was denied information that would allow her to properly serve Defendant, not prevent her from timely filing a Complaint. Civil Procedure Code section 351 is inapplicable (see Vehicle Code 17463 and Hirsch v. Blish (1976) 76 Cal. App. 3d 163. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2012 Continued To Jan-10-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - EMILY LLOYD, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. MARK CARBONE OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MACMORRIS & CARBONE, TEL. NO. (510) 267-7270 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS; DEFENDANT LAURA SANDERSON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 10, 2013. OPPOSITION TO BE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BY DECEMBER 17, 2012. REPLY TO BE FILED BY JANUARY 2, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (302/MJM)
